body.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 760 385" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="式子 3x+2(a−1)−7 的两层结构树：加法层切出三个项，乘法层把每个项拆成因数">
        <!-- layer bands -->
        <rect x="12" y="116" width="736" height="92" rx="10" fill="#F5F9F9"/>
        <rect x="12" y="248" width="736" height="122" rx="10" fill="#F5F9F9"/>
        <text x="26" y="142" font-size="13.5" font-weight="700" fill="#0A5E76">加法层</text>
        <text x="26" y="160" font-size="11" fill="#4C5A58">按 + − 切成项</text>
        <text x="26" y="274" font-size="13.5" font-weight="700" fill="#0F7D52">乘法层</text>
        <text x="26" y="292" font-size="11" fill="#4C5A58">每个项按 × 拆成因数</text>

        <!-- root -->
        <text x="390" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#8A9795">整个式子（树根）</text>
        <rect x="268" y="28" width="244" height="44" rx="10" fill="#E1F1F5" stroke="#0A5E76" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="390" y="56" text-anchor="middle" font-size="17" font-weight="600" fill="#15201F">3x + 2(a−1) − 7</text>

        <!-- edges root → terms -->
        <line x1="330" y1="72" x2="207" y2="130" stroke="#8A9795" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <line x1="390" y1="72" x2="390" y2="130" stroke="#8A9795" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <line x1="452" y1="72" x2="588" y2="130" stroke="#8A9795" stroke-width="1.5"/>

        <!-- term boxes -->
        <rect x="152" y="130" width="110" height="40" rx="9" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#0E7C9B" stroke-width="1.6"/>
        <text x="207" y="156" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="600" fill="#15201F">3x</text>
        <text x="207" y="192" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#4C5A58">第一项</text>

        <rect x="312" y="130" width="156" height="40" rx="9" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#0E7C9B" stroke-width="1.6"/>
        <text x="390" y="156" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="600" fill="#15201F">+2(a−1)</text>
        <text x="390" y="192" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#4C5A58">第二项（整体是一项）</text>

        <rect x="533" y="130" width="110" height="40" rx="9" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#0E7C9B" stroke-width="1.6"/>
        <text x="588" y="156" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="600" fill="#15201F">−7</text>
        <text x="588" y="192" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#4C5A58">第三项：常数项，负号是它的</text>

        <!-- edges term → factors -->
        <line x1="190" y1="170" x2="177" y2="262" stroke="#8A9795" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <line x1="224" y1="170" x2="237" y2="262" stroke="#8A9795" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <line x1="366" y1="170" x2="347" y2="262" stroke="#8A9795" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <line x1="414" y1="170" x2="440" y2="262" stroke="#8A9795" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <line x1="588" y1="170" x2="588" y2="262" stroke="#8A9795" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4 4"/>

        <!-- factor boxes -->
        <rect x="152" y="262" width="50" height="38" rx="9" fill="#E4F6EE" stroke="#0F7D52" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="177" y="287" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#15201F">3</text>
        <rect x="212" y="262" width="50" height="38" rx="9" fill="#E4F6EE" stroke="#0F7D52" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="237" y="287" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#15201F">x</text>
        <text x="207" y="322" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#4C5A58">两个因数：3 和 x</text>

        <rect x="322" y="262" width="50" height="38" rx="9" fill="#E4F6EE" stroke="#0F7D52" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="347" y="287" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#15201F">2</text>
        <rect x="382" y="262" width="116" height="38" rx="9" fill="#E4F6EE" stroke="#0F7D52" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="440" y="287" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#15201F">(a−1)</text>
        <text x="410" y="322" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#4C5A58">因数 2；(a−1) 带字母，叫因式</text>

        <rect x="533" y="262" width="110" height="38" rx="9" fill="#E4F6EE" stroke="#0F7D52" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="588" y="287" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#15201F">−7</text>
        <text x="588" y="322" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#4C5A58">一个数，不再拆</text>

        <text x="380" y="352" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11.5" fill="#8A9795">同一个 3：站在乘法层，所以它是因数，不是项</text>
      </svg>
